name: @asm3r96/pi-loops
description_en: A reusable Pi extension that adds a supervised loop harness around the normal Pi coding agent. Supports bounded LLM nodes, deterministic gates, steering, evidence collection, and composable workflow definitions.
description_zh: 可重用的 Pi 扩展，在普通 Pi 编码代理周围添加受监督的循环框架。支持有界的 LLM 节点、确定性门、转向、证据收集和可组合工作流定义。
